text.title: Agentic Commerce Future Trends Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether agentic-commerce-future-trends applies. Root question is a concrete observable; branches name a specific input pattern (`when`) and conclude with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Has the business completed ≥30 days of paid + organic across platforms AND is preparing a 12-24 month GEO strategy?

branch.when: yes AND <3 platforms sampled for NAP
yes AND roadmap has no budget tags
yes AND task-completion content slice unmeasured

example.description: When the root condition holds and the first matching branch fires, the tree concludes with the referenced rule id — meaning the methodology applies via that rule. The agent loads the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follows it. When the root condition does not hold, the tree concludes with `skip-methodology`.
